llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Technician, Production
jobs.description: About BASF At BASF, we create chemistry for a sustainable future. We combine economic success with environmental protection and social responsibility. Around 112,000 employees in the BASF Group contribute to the success of our customers in nearly all sectors and almost every country in the world. Our portfolio comprises six segments: Chemicals, Materials, Industrial Solutions, Surface Technologies, Nutrition Care and Agricultural Solutions. BASF generated sales of €65.3 billion in 2024. BASF shares are traded on the stock exchange in Frankfurt (BAS) and as American Depositary Receipts (BASFY) in the United States. Further information at www.basf.com . Objectives of the Position According to the defined production processes and quality requirements, you are required to schedule and plan in line with Company EHS guideline, properly operate the machines/equipment, and handle the chemical raw materials to fabricate the products that meet the requirements in quantity, quality, schedule, and process. How You Will Do It Main Tasks • Perform on-site control and manual operation in the area of responsibility • Maintain a clean environment in the area of responsibility • All activities at wo

jobs.title: Supervisor, Manufacturing
jobs.description: 1. Process Improvement Digitalization – NGBA steering associated improvements As the global point of contact for G-EDM Manufacturing processes, lead participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to different production sites. Guide production site leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalizing process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and best practices to drive further development and alignment. 2. Change Management – Technical Organizational Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Manufacturing. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 3. Stakeholder Management Global Co-ordination Provide regular updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in Manufacturing. Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Manufacturing topics. Build an internal G-EDM Manufacturing expert community.
